transcript.text:
(On one peaceful day...)
What?! Really?!?!
My dear!
(Tzuyang is here) Look at this long-legged octopus...!
(Tzuyang is here) Look at the size!
(Caught from the mudflat in the morning,) Did you just catch them?
(displaying its ultimate freshness) Look how fresh they are!
They're so big!
(The best long-legged octopus dish!)
(Tzuyang can really eat a lot?)
(It's too much for one...) Not sure...
(Not a problem) Amazing!
(The one envious of the big eater...) I'm so envious... my daughter doesn't eat much
(The one happy about the delicious food...) Wow, they taste so special
(A tasty flavor)
(and moving moment coexist) No, no

(in this special long-legged octopus 'healing mukbang,' starting now!)
Hello, everyone
Today,
I came to Sagang Traditional Market around Jebudo island
I heard many long-legged octopuses live in the mudflat on the island
I was mulling over what to eat,
and came to have long-legged octopus kalguksu
I heard one place catches the octopus
in the mudflat of Jebudo island every day,
and make long-legged octopus kalguksu here
('Songsan Kalguksu' located in Hwaseong-si, Gyeonggi-do)
(Entering the restaurant) Hello
I came to this place by chance
(The owner's picture that mesmerizes Tzuyang) There was a picture of the owner catching a long-legged octopus
It made me want to come to this place
(Various dishes of 'Songsan Kalguksu') Let's see... the kalguksu would be great

Do you catch the octopus yourself?
You'll see the person who catches them if you wait a bit
(The fresh octopuses are coming from Jebudo island) Really?
He catches over 100 on a good day!
100 octopuses?
(Catching from 30 to 50 on average on a daily basis)
Long-legged octopus caught in spring are the best
So excited!
What's popular here?
Long-legged octopus kalguksu is the bestseller,
and chopped raw long-legged octopus or long-legged octopus hot pot is good too...
I think they'd be too much for one person...
I happen to eat a lot...
It's still too much!
(Sad) Really?
(Spotted stir-fried long-legged octopus on the menu) Wait, I gotta think... they even have stir-fried long-legged octopus

(The stir-fried long-legged octopus is also prepared with fresh octopus!)
(The prices are so low...?) Wow, with live octopus?
(Incredible price...!) They use live octopus, and they're this cheap?
(Placing orders) Ma'am,
Manila clam sujebi,
spicy sujebi,
kimchi kalguksu,
seafood kalguksu,
and stir-fried long-legged octopus
You're eating all that?
(An innocent brag about her stomach) I eat a lot
(O...kay)
(The octopus-catching owner appeared!) Hello!
Show her your catch
(Let's go look at the octopus) I wanna see!
(In the box the owner took out of the car...)

(In the box the owner took out of the car...) You caught these just now?
(Fresh long-legged octopuses caught every morning in the mudflat of Jebudo island) Look how fresh they are!
(Their sizes are amazing too) Wow, so big!
(The octopuses are rinsed at his place and brought to the restaurant)
- You're having the kalguksu, right? - Yeah
(He's bringing it to the kitchen...?)
(The freshest dish ever...)
(Let's see...) I don't know...
5 dishes are too much for one person
(Don't worry, she finishes anything delicious...)
(The dough is hand-pulled with the owner's magic touch...!)
(Manila clam sujebi)
(Spicy sujebi)
(2 kinds of kalguksu are served first!) The portions are so big!
(The most plentiful) Thank you!
Wow, this is hand-made!

Yeah, this is what I'm talking about
(It's full of Manila clams as well!) Look at the clams
I'll try the soup a little bit
Wow, the soup
It's amazing
(While she's immersed in the hand-made sujebi)
(A seafood party started!)
(A fresh long-legged octopus is put in whole...!)
(Seafood kalguksu)
(Kimchi kalguksu)
Fire
(A big one... is on its way...)
(The combination of fresh long-legged octopus)
(and the spiciness that'll make your mouth water)
(Drop the octopus)
(Even its appearance is insane)

(Stir-fried long-legged octopus)
Thanks! Please, put it up there
Thank you
(Everything is served) Wow, look at the octopus
(Everything is served) Look at the size of it
Awesome! This is a freshly caught long-legged octopus from the mudflat!
It looks so delicious! Thanks for the food!
You can't finish them all, how can anyone?
It seems like you'd leave food...
I'll try my best!
I'll give you one more octopus
I'll get one more octopus if I finish all!
Thank you
Wow, look at it
An octopus this big is put in there whole
I'll try the whole octopus

It's so tender, you don't even need to cut it
It's very chewy, but tender
The tender meat is so delicious!
Let me cut it
The legs
I asked them to include the intestines in the dishes,
(Intestines are not usually included, but they're put in upon the request) and they graciously granted my request
Slurping the octopus!
(There are so many noodles too...)
Wow, the value is insane
I added an extra octopus in the seafood kalguksu
The noodles are great too
The noodles are very chewy
It's not the mushy flour noodles
You know, there's a kind of noodles that's chewy
(Slurping noodles and octopus at the same time...)

Can I use a ladle?
(+ Tzuyang has acquired a ladle)
Onto the ladle
(Filling the ladle with noodles...)
Wow, the soup is amazing
The seafood kalguksu is so delicious
(Feels good)
Wow, an egg! There's an octopus egg here
(Not very appetizing...) It looks a bit grotesque, right?
(She eats anything delicious) The intestine exploded
Wow, so good!
(Intestine lover) I love intestines so much
(Intestine lover) This is an egg
Wow, the egg!
(The egg is filled inside) It tastes like a webfoot octopus
I should try the stir-fried long-legged octopus

(Says 'delicious' using the face, lol)
Wow, clearly
they taste so special
The octopus is so delicious
They're so tender
It's insane
I can't tell if she really means it
It's really good!
Thank you
Let me set these aside for now
I'll try the kimchi kalguksu now
I thought it was going to be transparent red
because it had kimchi in its name
(Deep taste) Look at the color
I don't much care for thin and wide noodles
used for kalguksu

But, this has thick noodles,
and it's pretty chewy
I love this texture
(Where did all the noodles go?)
How can an octopus taste like this...?
(A bite with bean sprouts!)
While I shoot videos,
there are various situations that make me happy
One of them is when I enter a restaurant
that's not famous by chance,
and their food turns out to be great
(She's taking a moment to separate the clams)
Wow, this place
has deliciously spicy soup
(Kimchi kalguksu cleared!) I already finished it
Let me move on

(Manila clam sujebi, to the front!) The sujebi is great! I tried them earlier
I've tried to make hand-made sujebi before
but it came out
to be 3 times thicker than these, lol
(It's that difficult) It's not easy
So delicious
(The Manila clam grave)
I'll have some seafood now
(Scallops full of meat...!)
(Sigh...)
Was it always there?
No
(Confident distrust) It feels like it was there for a long time
I thought it was a part of the print on the hoodie
What?
How can you not know? It's octopus intestine even at a glance

(I really didn't know...)
(I'll tell you how long...) How long has this been on me?
(It was a second ago...)
The crab is for the soup, but it's delicious
The soup seeped into the crab
It's so delicious
It's insane
(Spotted a shrimp!) Even the shrimp is big!
Let me peel it
It's so fresh
Judging by how thin the shells are,
it's a fresh ingredient
(Another shrimp!)
(Seafood kalguksu, cleared!) The shrimp is good
Lastly, the spicy sujebi!
(You're dipping your hoodie in the soup...)

Lol...
(A reason to shop for a new hoodie) I should get a new hoodie
The stir-fried long-legged octopus is legendary
I mean it
(Shooting on Friday) It's already Friday today
(Yay) It's the weekend tomorrow!
Mr. Producer, you don't seem to be happy
I gotta play with my kids...
(Dad, you're doing great!)
I'll put an octopus on the sujebi
I remember I wrapped something in a sujebi to eat
(She wrapped chicken rib in a pot sujebi)
Delicious!
It's so good
(Another session of clam separation...!)
Look how thin the sujebi are! They're as thin as a curtain!

(Surprisingly, this is hand-made...!)
Eating only the octopus!
I'll have to give you one more octopus
(An octopus was promised upon finishing all the food)
I'll give you a live octopus, on the house
I'm good
It's a promise!
You put effort in catching them...
Did you enjoy the food?
They were so good!
I haven't finished them all yet, I've got some left
(She... really finished it all...)
You're so good at cooking
(The queen of the magic touch!)
You put effort in catching the octopuses,
(Thanks for the thought) so I'll just visit here again later

(I'll visit here again...!) You can give it to me then
I'm envious... my daughter don't eat much
My daughter is in charge of promoting the restaurant online,
so I don't have to worry about it
Did you give her a call to tell I'm here to shoot a video?
- No - You didn't?
(She's calling while they're at it)
(She answered!)
Mom's on a YouTube video, you wanna FaceTime and see?
Tzuyang!
What? For real?
Are you sure?
Yeah, she's here shooting her video
Agh! My dear!
(The daughter is so cute, lol)
H... hi!

Hi! Oh, my god!
I enjoyed the meal
while I shot the video
What's going on...?
- Oh, thank you so much - No, thank you
(The daughter crying out thinking of her hardworking parents)
I'm grateful to have these great dishes
You won a lottery, mom
(The daughter wishes her parents' restaurant will be full of happy customers)
My god, I'm so happy
I'm thankful to you
(We hope the warm-hearted daughter to always have a happy day)
(The proud parent showing her daughter) This is her? She's beautiful!
(She's as beautiful as her mind)
(Body guard)
(Let's quickly finish the food and take a picture!) She wants me to take a picture of you and send it to her

('Songsan Kalguksu,' all cleared!)
I came to Jebudo Island today,
and came to this restaurant by chance
only with a thought of wanting some kalguksu
but the food turned out to be great, so I could enjoy the meal
Thanks for the food today!
Thank you
I really enjoyed the meal
It was really good
- You're the best! - Thank you
(My lovely daughter: It's insane) (The warm food warmed Tzuyang's heart too...!)
